name: github_stars_30d
definition: Net new GitHub stars in 30 days from launch anchor (tag, Show HN, or list PR merge).
target_hint: Aggressive OSS + Show HN: 200–800 in 30d. Cold repo runway: 30–120. Awesome-list merge alone: 50–200 over 60d.

name: github_clones_14d
definition: Repository clone count (GitHub Insights) in 14d post-launch spike.
target_hint: Stars × 0.3–1.2 clones typical for dev tools; clones without stars = README/install friction.

name: awesome_list_pr_merge_rate
definition: Merged awesome-list PRs / PRs opened in launch window.
target_hint: 20–40% with personalized PRs; <10% = boilerplate or wrong list fit.

name: registry_installs_7d
definition: npm/PyPI/crates weekly downloads in 7d post-release (registry analytics).
target_hint: Show HN spike: 500–5k downloads week 1 for niche tool; track vs prior baseline.

name: release_notes_referrer_sessions
definition: Sessions from blog/Dev.to/GitHub Releases landing in 7d after tagged release.
target_hint: 200–1.5k per major release post when cross-posted; <50 = thin release notes.

name: show_hn_to_star_conversion
definition: New stars in H0–H+72h / HN referrer sessions (community-launch paired).
target_hint: 3–8% when README CTA placed after install proof; <1% = CTA too early or broken install.

name: good_first_issue_pickup_30d
definition: External contributors closing good-first-issue labeled PRs within 30d.
target_hint: ≥1 merged external PR = healthy; 0 with 50+ stars = labeling or docs gap.

name: maintainer_dm_incidents
definition: Count of public callouts, blocks, or list maintainer rejections citing spam in launch window.
target_hint: 0 is the only acceptable target; any incident → pause DMs 60d.
